details.description:
Welcome to 2718 Church Avenue, a beacon of luxury nestled at the intersection of PLG and Flatbush, Brooklyn. This one bedroom, one bathroom residence is thoughtfully designed to provide the ultimate in comfort and convenience. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows flood the spacious interiors with natural light, and designer finishes create an atmosphere of understated elegance.
Situated just steps from the 2; 5 train, 2718 Church Ave is just moments from all that Brooklyn has to offer. Our unique amenities offer a complete lifestyle package, designed to feel like a warm extension of each home. Additionally, the building?s proximity to Prospect Park offers endless recreational opportunities.
Amenities include: + Recreational Lounge + Generous Co-working space with Wifi + Furnished Rooftop Terrace + Fully Equipped Fitness Center + Package Room + Secure Bike Room + Yoga Room + Parking Available + Washer/Dryer in Each Residence

amenities.other: A/C, Stainless steel appliances, Central A/C, Hardwood Floors, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:

amenities.other: A/C, Central A/C, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances

details.description:
Myspace Exclusive!
Fabulous 2 bedroom in a classic prewar Williamsburg building. Fully renovated with gorgeous hardwood floors and tons of natural light streaming in. Big living room! Recently renovated. On-site super.
You?ll love living in this vibrant, lively neighborhood with all the necessities right outside your door and steps away from hotspots like Baby?s All Right, Bembe and Rabbit Hole, Williamsburg Bridge, Domino Park, Seawolf, etc. Commuting is quick and easy with a short distance to the Marcy JMZ.
Available June 1 Small pets OK!

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
Beautiful 1 bed / 1 bath apartment in East Williamsburg, prime location! This apartment features spacious living room, queen-sized bedroom, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout.
You?ll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Roberta?s, Sweet Science, Honey?s, Wayward Social, Syndicated, Guadalupe, Reclamation, Ichiran, Momo Sushi Shack, El Cortez.
Short commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Only blocks from the G train, and a short walk to the L train.
July 1 move in Small pets welcome No broker fee

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
Nice 1 bedroom 1 bath pre-war unit available in south Williamsburg, great quiet location.
- 1 bedroom (could also work as a very small 2 bedroom) - Hardwood floors - Stainless steel appliances
This is the ideal opportunity to live in one of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Walk in to a spacious living area with an open kitchen and plenty of dining space. Large bedroom closet. Heat and hot water is included so no need to mind the thermostat. Enjoy a multitude of cafes in your community. Located just a few blocks to Williamsburg Smorgasburg/Flea Market. Cut your commute time to the city with the J, M, Z trains minutes from your door. Bring your small furry friends ? the building allows pets!
Easy commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Domino Park, Williamsburg Bridge, etc nearby.
June 1 move in Small pets welcome Heat and hot water included

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances

details.description:
Beautiful 1.5 bedroom apartment available in south Williamsburg, great quiet location. Nice renovation!
- 1 bedroom + home office (could also be just a regular 1 bedroom) - Hardwood floors - Stainless steel appliances
This is the ideal opportunity to live in one of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Walk in to a spacious living area with an open kitchen and plenty of dining space. Large bedroom closet. Heat and hot water is included so no need to mind the thermostat. Enjoy a multitude of cafes in your community. Located just a few blocks to Williamsburg Smorgasburg/Flea Market. Cut your commute time to the city with the J, M, Z trains minutes from your door. Bring your small furry friends ? the building allows pets!
Easy commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Domino Park, Williamsburg Bridge, etc nearby.
June 1 move in Small pets welcome Heat and hot water included

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description: Lovely two bedroom apartment located in the heart of Bushwick. The apartment features hardwood floors throughout and a renovated kitchen with stainless steal appliances and butcher block bar/island. The large bedrooms have plenty of natural light to start your morning off right. The building is pet friendly and has laundry facility in the basement so no need to haul those heavy laundry bags. Great location just one block from Maria Hernandez Park, Jefferson L train stop and surrounded by popular taverns and cafes. No fee!

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description: Lovely two bedroom apartment located in the heart of Bushwick. The apartment features hardwood floors throughout and a renovated kitchen with stainless steal appliances and butcher block bar/island. The large bedrooms have plenty of natural light to start your morning off right. The building is pet friendly and has laundry facility in the basement so no need to haul those heavy laundry bags. Great location just one block from Maria Hernandez Park, Jefferson L train stop and surrounded by popular taverns and cafes. No fee!

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
June 1 ? Spacious 2.5 Bed near the Knickerbocker M! Pets Welcome (with approval)
Bright and roomy apartment featuring:
Two queen-sized bedrooms plus a bonus room (no window)
Exposed brick and modern finishes
Dishwasher
Great natural light
Spacious living area
Sleek bathroom
4th floor walk-up
Amazing Bushwick location?just a short walk to local favorites like Boobie Trap, Rico Chimi, Talon Bar, and Old Stanley?s. Close to the Knickerbocker M and Myrtle M/L trains!

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
June 1st Move-In Spacious 2-Bedroom Duplex with Shared Backyard ? Right by Dumbo; Vinegar Hill
Freshly updated duplex in the Downtown Brooklyn area. The apartment offers two bedrooms upstairs with a sleek, modern bathroom, while the lower level features a large open living space?perfect for relaxing or entertaining.
You?ll also enjoy access to a shared backyard (only one other unit), giving you a rare bit of outdoor space in the city.
Set just minutes from Dumbo and Vinegar Hill, the location puts you close to multiple subway lines, great restaurants, and everyday essentials. Wegmans, Whole Foods, and Trader Joe?s are all nearby, making errands easy.
A clean, comfortable layout in a super convenient neighborhood?definitely worth checking out.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Duplex, Private Outdoor Space

details.description:
Flexible Layout ? 2 Bed / 2 Bath in the Heart of Downtown Brooklyn
Spacious and versatile, this unique apartment offers two large bedrooms and two full bathrooms with a central hallway kitchen?ideal for roommates, a couple, or anyone needing extra space. Use it as a massive 1-bedroom with home office, two separate studios with private entrances, or a true 2-bedroom (note: no shared living room).
Enjoy north and south exposures, two entrances, and unbeatable convenience?just minutes from Trader Joe?s, Macy?s, and major subway lines.
Flexible layout. Prime location. Endless possibilities.

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1-; 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio; panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus; Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops; F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Private Outdoor Space, Central A/C

details.description:
2 Bed / 2 Bath at 169 Johnson Ave, Williamsburg ? Pet Friendly
Modern 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment in the heart of Williamsburg, just steps from the Broadway G, Montrose L, and Lorimer J/M trains.
This spacious layout offers a sleek kitchen with stainless steel appliances, a bright living room, and two well-sized bedrooms. Some units feature private balconies or kitchen islands for extra space and style.
The building includes top-tier amenities: ? Fully equipped fitness center ? WiFi-ready business lounge ? Rooftop deck with sweeping Manhattan views
Available now?message to set up a showing.

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
Modern living at the Clinton Hill/Bed-Stuy border!
Spacious 2-bed with open layout, private balcony, hardwood floors, high ceilings, and great light. Central A/C, dishwasher, and stainless steel appliances.
Enjoy building perks: gym, lounge, game room, furnished roof with skyline views, laundry, bike storage, and shared workspaces.
Close to Franklin Ave C/S trains (1 block), local spots like Outpost, Doris, Sisters; more.
📍 1st month + security to move in 📍 No broker fee

amenities.other: A/C, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Intercom system, Central A/C, Roof Access

Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances, Central A/C
Hardwood Floors, Central A/C, Dishwasher, Stainless steel appliances, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:
77 Commercial is a new landmark on the north edge of the Greenpoint, Brooklyn waterfront, situated between two great outdoor spaces ? a beautiful, lushly landscaped inner court to the east, and the long anticipated Box Street Park to the west.
Discover a range of living spaces tailored to your needs, including studios, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, and 3-bedroom layouts.
Apartment Features: -Expansive living areas boasting breathtaking views -Fully equipped kitchens with stainless steel appliances -Dishwasher -In-unit washer/dryer for added convenience -Individual AC/Heat units -Big windows inviting abundant natural light -Soaring high ceilings and elegant hardwood floors
Building Amenities: -State-of-the-art fitness center -Relaxing sauna -Basketball and tennis courts -Inviting indoor pool with direct access to outdoor pool deck -Multiple BBQ grilling areas -Rooftop retreat offering panoramic views -Residents lounge and versatile working space -Entertainment-filled recreation room -Secure bicycle storage -Convenient elevators -Parking garage available (additional fee applies)
Location: Enjoy seamless access to the new esplanade and ferry terminal, ensuring swift commutes to Manhattan.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances, Central A/C

details.description: Luxury, brand-new 2br/2bth in the heart of Brooklyn with abundant natural light and in-unit washer/dryer, plus amenities including a gym, bike room, package room, parking, roof deck, and co-working space.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:
Spacious one-bedroom duplex located just moments from Prospect Park.
Conveniently situated near a wide range of shopping, dining, and everyday essentials, with easy access to the B, Q, 2, and 5 train lines.
The apartment features a king-size bedroom with a closet and a modern kitchen equipped with a dishwasher, microwave, and ample cabinet space. A well-designed duplex layout offers added flexibility and separation of living space.

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
Welcome to 1326 Ocean Ave Studios ? 1-Bed ? 2-Bed Apartments in Prime Midwood / Ditmas Park
Spacious, well-designed residences featuring high ceilings, large kitchens with dishwashers, and excellent closet space. Select units offer private balconies, and all layouts are designed to comfortably accommodate modern living.
Apartment Features
High ceilings
Large kitchens
Dishwasher
Queen-size bedroom layouts
Ample closet space
Private balconies (select units)
Building Amenities
Gym
Rooftop
Lounge
Game room
Bike storage
Laundry room
Conveniently located near shops, dining, and transportation.

amenities.other: A/C, Balcony/Terrace, Dishwasher

details.description: BRAND NEW LUXURY BUILDING in the beautiful Vinegar Hill area of DUMBO!! Enjoy unbelievable views across both the Manhattan Bridge and Brooklyn Bridge. Visit the countless parks nearby such as John St Park, Main St Park, Trinity Park, Brooklyn Bridge Park, Cadman Plaza Park, Whitman Park and even more! Become a patron of some of the long standing and delicious LOCAL local restaurants such as Bridge Coffee and still enjoy those late night cravings spots we pretend we don't know and love (*cough Shake Shack) just a few blocks further. Take a little old school Brooklyn, mix in some new luxury living, and that's how you'll end up falling in love with your new home here!Conveniently located off the A, C and F trains as well as the B57, B62, B69 bus routes.UNIT FEATURES:Hardwood FloorsStainless Steel KitchenDishwasher; MicrowaveCentral A/C; HeatInquire for Private Balconies!Inquire for IN UNIT laundry!BUILDING FEATURES:Roof DeckLaundry RoomFitness CenterRec RoomTenant LoungePackage RoomBike StoragePets AllowedFirst; SecurityNO BROKER FEE!

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C, Roof Access, Shared Outdoor Space
